name: Weaver Nervous System — Akashic Entanglement Mesh

nodes.name: 1. Input Gateway
nodes.notes: Entry point — receives raw text/audio/vision input from VTV Core or external API calls. Triggers the full nervous system pipeline.

nodes.name: 2. Akashic Hub (Vector State)
nodes.notes: Central shared vector state — all lobes read from here simultaneously. Maps to akashic_hub.py AkashicHub class. dim=256, trace_depth=32.

nodes.name: 3. Liquid Fracture Engine
nodes.notes: Fractures input into 5 dimensional shards with liquid-adaptive routing weights. Maps to liquid_fracture.py. Uses LTC ODE with input-dependent time constants.

nodes.name: 4. YDN Pineal Gate (MoE Router)
nodes.notes: Sparse top-3 MoE router. Maps lobes to regular pentagon vertices. Geometric interference modulation. Maps to pineal_gate.py.

nodes.name: 5a. Logic Lobe (SLM)
nodes.notes: Analytical reasoning expert. Self-contained Function node. Real SLM inference runs in slm_experts.py.

nodes.name: 5b. Emotion Lobe (SLM)
nodes.notes: Empathic resonance expert. Self-contained Function node.

nodes.name: 5c. Memory Lobe (SLM)
nodes.notes: Continuity and recall expert. Self-contained Function node.

nodes.name: 5d. Creativity Lobe (SLM)
nodes.notes: Novel synthesis expert. Self-contained Function node.

nodes.name: 5e. Vigilance Lobe (SLM)
nodes.notes: Threat detection and paranoia expert. Self-contained Function node.

nodes.name: 6. Geometric Collapse
nodes.notes: Collapses multi-expert outputs into single manifested response. Uses geometric interference from pentagon vertex mapping. Maps to pineal_gate.py _collapse().

nodes.name: 7. Akashic Writeback
nodes.notes: Writes collapsed manifested state back to the Akashic Hub. All lobes see the result on next read cycle.

nodes.name: 8. Manifested Response
nodes.notes: Returns the collapsed manifested response to the caller. This is what VTV Core receives and speaks.

nodes.name: Q. Quantum Soul Feed
nodes.notes: Background quantum state injector. Runs every 5 min. Maps to quantum_soul.py quantum_soul_loop(). Writes dominant pathway to Akashic Hub.

nodes.name: N. Nexus Bus Bridge
nodes.notes: Bridges n8n mesh to the WebSocket Nexus Bus (ws://localhost:9999). Maps to nexus_bus.py. Allows external lobes to participate in the mesh.
